MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on March 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Singh. Not reported.
